summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Qaivid 2.0 Secrets Manager feature. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - Settings modal works correctly on both Dashboard and ProjectWorkspace, with full CRUD functionality for API keys.

issues: Console 404 errors for missing resources (favicon, etc.) - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality
React warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: Secrets Manager implementation is solid - keys stored in MongoDB, cached in memory, never logged
SettingsModal component has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
API validation correctly rejects invalid key names and missing values
seed_data_creation: None - tests create and cleanup their own data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Secrets Manager feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoints: GET /api/secrets (status), POST /api/secrets (save), DELETE /api/secrets/{key} (remove), GET /api/secrets/meta (metadata). Frontend: Settings gear button on Dashboard (data-testid='settings-btn') and ProjectWorkspace (data-testid='workspace-settings-btn'). Modal has inputs for OPENAI_API_KEY and GEMINI_API_KEY with save/delete/toggle visibility functionality.
passed_tests: GET /api/ - API health check
GET /api/secrets - returns status of each key (configured/not set, source)
GET /api/secrets/meta - returns metadata for all required secrets
POST /api/secrets - save OpenAI API key
POST /api/secrets - save Gemini API key
POST /api/secrets - rejects missing key
POST /api/secrets - rejects missing value
POST /api/secrets - rejects invalid key name
DELETE /api/secrets/{key} - removes a key
POST /api/secrets - can update existing key
POST /api/projects - creates a project
GET /api/projects - lists all projects
GET /api/projects/{id} - fetches project for workspace
Dashboard: Settings gear button visible in navbar
Dashboard: Settings modal opens with API key fields
Dashboard: Can input text in API key fields
Dashboard: Toggle show/hide password works
Dashboard: Save button calls POST /api/secrets correctly
Dashboard: Status indicator updates from 'not set' to 'database'
Dashboard: Delete button removes key and updates status
Dashboard: Modal closes via X button
Dashboard: Modal closes via Done button
Dashboard: External links to OpenAI Keys and Gemini Keys present
ProjectWorkspace: Settings gear button visible in header
ProjectWorkspace: Settings modal opens correctly
ProjectWorkspace: All 9 pipeline tabs present (input, intelligence, brief, storyboard, shots, timeline, generation, production, continuity)
Project cards are clickable and navigate to workspace
Back to dashboard navigation works
